metadata.name: Traefik CircuitBreaker Middleware
metadata.description: Traefik Middleware CRD for tripping a circuit breaker when an upstream meets a configured failure expression.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a Traefik Middleware resource for `circuitBreaker` so unstable backends can be protected with a simple failure expression.

## Prerequisites
- Traefik must be installed with the Kubernetes CRD provider enabled.
- Review the expression carefully and understand how it interacts with the upstream service and any retry logic.

## Apply
- Render `main.yaml`, review the expression, then apply it with `kubectl apply -f main.yaml`.
- Start with conservative thresholds and observe backend behavior before using more aggressive failure conditions.

## Follow-Up
- Combine this middleware with retries or buffering only when those settings make sense for the same upstream.
- Watch Traefik logs and service health metrics so you can tune the expression with real traffic patterns.

## References
- [CircuitBreaker Middleware](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/middlewares/http/circuitbreaker/)
- [Traefik Kubernetes CRD](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/routing/providers/kubernetes-crd/)

variables.name: resource_name
variables.title: Middleware name
variables.description: Name to use for the Middleware resource.
